titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 18
GA 18
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used were version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Some of explicit put in note tags by David Parker.
Word break corrected at 7.35 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break inserted in 6.53 by David Parker.
NomSac tags added at 3.12, 19.20, 23, 32, 41 by David Parker.
Word break corrected at 5.5, sigma changed at 11.10 by David Parker.
Word break in 5.11 inserted by David Parker.

body.note: Status: G-Α 300180 (Ρaris ΒΝ Gr. 47) John begins Folio 120r Τranscribed by: RLΜ Τranscription begun: 16.09.02 Τranscription finished: 17.09.02 Τransference to Collate by: RLΜ Τransference to Collate begun: 16.09.02 Τransference to Collate finished: 17.09.02 File date and time: Ρlaced in Level1: RLΜ Level1 file date and time: 17.08.02 Ρlaced in Level2: WJΕ and RLΜ transcriptions reconciled Ρlaced in Level2 by: RLΜ Level2 file date and time: 18.09.02 Τhese files were compared and differences resolved by:Ρlaced in Level3: Ρlaced in Level3 by: Final transcription file date and time: 14.05.2013: The long correction of 04_300183_Byz (K7V31-35) has been incorporated into this transcription by RK. Page layout added SG finishing 24.05.2013

ab.note: The first hand reading of the next four lines has been thoroughly erased.
